tasks_per_vuln.description: Apply remediation for this CVE on the affected host. Verify fix post-patch.

batch_tasks.title: Weekly Batch Review
batch_tasks.description: Review all medium vulnerabilities in this batch. Prioritise by risk score.

batch_tasks.title: Batch Remediation — Apply All Patches
batch_tasks.description: Apply patches for all vulnerabilities in this batch during scheduled maintenance window.

batch_tasks.title: Batch Validation — Re-Scan All Hosts
batch_tasks.description: Run scanner against all affected hosts to confirm all vulnerabilities are resolved.

batch_tasks.title: Close Batch and Update Dashboard
batch_tasks.description: Mark all individual vulns resolved in the dashboard. Close this case.
